title: Visible Suspicious Stew
description: Ever wanted to know what you're eating? This mod tells you exactly which effect suspicious stews grant and for how long!
body:
### How to Install:

1. Download the mod.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game.
4. Enjoy!

### What the Mod Does:

* Shows detailed info when holding a suspicious stew.
* Displays the effect ID and its duration. (also injected into the tooltip in the inventory)
* Overrides a texture depending on the effect

NOTE: 1.21.8 (there may be others too) doesnt work with the latest version

### Dependencies:
* [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
* [Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)

### Got suggestions? 
##### Dm me on discord "Nebulajinxed"
